final_prompt.prompt:
Create a surrealist dreamscape illustration with philosophical depth and visual impact.

Style/medium: surrealist oil painting in the spirit of Salvador Dalí and René Magritte, dreamlike hyperreality with precise rendering of impossible elements
Composition: wide panoramic vista, eye-level horizon dividing sea and sky, multiple focal points arranged in ascending layers from sea to clouds
Subject: colossal moon rising from ocean surface, humpback whales suspended mid-flight through the air, melting pocket watch draped over floating rocks, spiral stone staircase ascending into cumulus clouds
Scene/backdrop: infinite ocean at twilight, mirror-still water reflecting the impossible moon, stratospheric cloud layer forming an ethereal ceiling
Lighting/mood: soft volumetric moonlight casting long shadows, subtle bioluminescence from the sea surface, contemplative and mysterious atmosphere suggesting the boundary between waking and dreaming
Color palette: deep indigo and ultramarine as base, silver-white moonlight as anchor, warm amber highlights on the melting clock, muted teal for the whales
Materials/textures: smooth polished stone on the staircase, viscous liquid metal of the melting clock, matte skin of the whales, crystalline moon surface
Avoid: photorealistic rendering that kills the dream quality, oversaturated colors, stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer language, literal interpretation without surrealist distortion
